---
title: "AE analysis"
output:
  html_notebook:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 4
    toc_float: true
    theme: simplex
    number_sections: true
    highlight: zenburn
    fig_width: 8
    fig_height: 6
    css: custom.css
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: '4'
    df_print: paged
---

```{r warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
library(tidyverse)
library(tableone)
library(openxlsx)
library(sjPlot)
library(knitr)
library(magrittr)
library(gtsummary)
library(janitor)
```

# Data Setup 
```{r}
library(readxl)
# load ae excel: sheet = ICU-SLEEP_Adverse Events sheet; only columns = SID, Event

ae <- read_xlsx("data/ICU-SLEEP_Data_P1_Deidentified_11.26.25.xlsx", 
                sheet = "ICU-SLEEP_Adverse Events", range = "B1:F2879") %>% 
  clean_names() %>% 
  select(sid, event, event_type)

# add row_number to account for multiple AE or SAE per patient
ae <- ae %>% group_by(sid, event_type, event) %>%
  mutate(event_count_id = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

# group
group = readRDS("data/rds/group.rds") %>% select(sid, group)
mitt = readRDS("data/rds/mitt.rds")

# merge
ae_all = ae %>% filter(sid %in% mitt$sid)
group = group %>% filter(sid %in% mitt$sid)
```

# recode SAE subtypes
```{r}
ae_all <- ae_all %>%
  mutate(event = case_when(
    sid == "197b" & event == "other_sae" & event_count_id == 1  ~ "Cardiac arrhythmias: Newly developed A-Fib",
    sid == "246" & event == "other_sae" & event_count_id == 1 ~ "Cardiac arrhythmias: Newly developed V-tach",
    sid == "246" & event == "other_sae" & event_count_id == 2 ~ "Cardiac arrhythmias: Newly developed V-tach",
    sid == "312" & event == "other_sae" & event_count_id == 1  ~ "Cardiac arrhythmias: Newly developed A-Fib",
    sid == "320" & event == "other_sae" & event_count_id == 1 ~ "Cardiac arrhythmias: SVT, unspecified",
    sid == "330" & event == "other_sae" & event_count_id == 1 ~ "Cardiac arrhythmias: Newly developed A-Fib",
    sid == "341" & event == "other_sae" & event_count_id == 1 ~ "Cardiac arrhythmias: Newly developed A-Fib",
    sid == "345" & event == "other_sae" & event_count_id == 1 ~ "Cardiac arrhythmias: AFib-RVR (hx pAF)",
    sid == "350" & event == "other_sae" & event_count_id == 1 ~ "Cardiac arrhythmias: AFib-RVR (hx pAF)",
    TRUE         ~ event          # keep existing value otherwise
  ))

ae_all = ae_all %>% select(-event_count_id)
```

# choose 2 groups or 3 groups
```{r}
group = group %>%
  mutate(group_3g = group) %>%
  mutate(group_2g = case_when(group == "Placebo" ~ "Placebo",
                             group == "Dex 0.1 mcg/kg/h" ~ "Dex",
                             group == "Dex 0.3 mcg/kg/h" ~ "Dex"
                             ))

group = group %>% select(-group)

# now select 2group or 3 group
group = group %>% mutate(groupx = group_2g)
# group = group %>% mutate(groupx = group_3g)

table(group$groupx)
table(ae$event)
```

# analytical tables
```{r}
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# STEP 1: per-patient summary for "any event" of a given type (AE or SAE)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
summarise_any <- function(events_df, etype) {
  events_df %>%
    filter(event_type == etype) %>%
    group_by(sid) %>%
    summarise(any_count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(any_ind = 1L)
}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# STEP 2: per-patient summary for ONE subtype
# returns a df with: sid, <prefix>, <prefix>_count
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
summarise_subtype <- function(events_df, etype, event_name, prefix) {
  cnt <- paste0(prefix, "_count")
  events_df %>%
    filter(event_type == etype, event == event_name) %>%
    group_by(sid) %>%
    summarise(!!cnt := n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(!!prefix := 1L)
}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# STEP 3: assemble wide df — one row per patient in `base_group`
# subtypes_map: named list (prefix -> data event name); NA = subtype absent in data
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
build_wide <- function(events_df, etype, subtypes_map, base_group) {
  any_ev   <- summarise_any(events_df, etype)
  present  <- subtypes_map[!is.na(subtypes_map)]

  sub_dfs <- lapply(names(present), function(p) {
    summarise_subtype(events_df, etype, present[[p]], p)
  })

  wide <- Reduce(function(x, y) left_join(x, y, by = "sid"),
                 c(list(base_group, any_ev), sub_dfs))

  # binary: 0 if no event; count: keep NA so median ignores patients without event
  bin_cols <- c("any_ind", names(present))
  cnt_cols <- c("any_count", paste0(names(present), "_count"))
  wide %>%
    mutate(across(all_of(bin_cols), ~replace_na(as.integer(.x), 0L)),
           across(all_of(cnt_cols), as.integer))
}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# STEP 4: pad missing subtypes (not in data) with 0 binary / NA count columns
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
pad_missing_subtypes <- function(wide, subtypes_map) {
  miss <- names(subtypes_map)[is.na(subtypes_map)]
  for (p in miss) {
    wide[[p]]                   <- 0L
    wide[[paste0(p, "_count")]] <- NA_integer_
  }
  wide
}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# STEP 5: condition subtype indicators on having any event at all
# (subtype binary set to NA where any_ind == 0 -> denominator = any_ind == Yes)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
condition_on_any <- function(wide, prefixes) {
  wide %>%
    mutate(across(all_of(prefixes),
                  ~ifelse(any_ind == 0, NA_integer_, .x)))
}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# STEP 6: cast binary cols to Yes/No factors
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
factorize_binary <- function(wide, binary_vars) {
  wide %>%
    mutate(across(all_of(binary_vars),
                  ~factor(.x, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("No", "Yes"))))
}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# STEP 7: build & print tableone
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
build_tableone <- function(wide, prefixes, strata = "group") {
  binary_vars <- c("any_ind", prefixes)
  count_vars  <- c("any_count", paste0(prefixes, "_count"))
  tab_vars    <- as.vector(rbind(binary_vars, count_vars))   # interleave

  CreateTableOne(
    vars       = tab_vars,
    factorVars = binary_vars,
    strata     = strata,
    data       = wide
  )
}

print_tableone <- function(tab, prefixes, label,
                           exact = character(0)) {           
  count_vars <- c("any_count", paste0(prefixes, "_count"))
  cat("\n========== ", label, " ==========\n")
  print(tab,
        nonnormal     = count_vars,
        exact         = exact,                                
        smd           = TRUE,
        showAllLevels = FALSE,
        quote         = FALSE,
        noSpaces      = TRUE)
}


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Helper: pick which prefixes to display (drop missing + skip user-specified)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
select_prefixes <- function(subtypes_map,
                            skip = character(0),
                            drop_missing = TRUE) {
  prefixes <- names(subtypes_map)
  if (drop_missing) prefixes <- prefixes[!is.na(subtypes_map[prefixes])]
  setdiff(prefixes, skip)
}


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Subtype maps — edit here to control what appears in each table
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ae_map <- list(
  hr_low_rel  = "hr_low_rel_ae",
  hr_low_abs  = "hr_low_abs_ae",
  hr_high_rel = NA,
  hr_high_abs = "hr_high_abs_ae",
  bp_low_rel  = NA,
  bp_low_abs  = "bp_low_abs_ae",
  bp_high_rel = NA,
  bp_high_abs = "bp_high_abs_ae"
)

sae_map <- list(
  hr_low_rel     = NA,
  hr_low_abs     = "hr_low_abs_sae",
  hr_high_rel    = NA,
  hr_high_abs    = NA,
  bp_low_rel     = NA,
  bp_low_abs     = "bp_low_abs_sae",
  bp_high_rel    = NA,
  bp_high_abs    = NA,
  afib_new       = "Cardiac arrhythmias: Newly developed A-Fib",
  vtach_new      = "Cardiac arrhythmias: Newly developed V-tach",
  svt_unspec     = "Cardiac arrhythmias: SVT, unspecified",
  afib_rvr_hxpaf = "Cardiac arrhythmias: AFib-RVR (hx pAF)"
)

auto_exact <- function(wide, prefixes, strata = "group") {
  bins <- c("any_ind", prefixes)
  exact <- c()
  for (v in bins) {
    tb <- table(wide[[v]], wide[[strata]])
    if (any(dim(tb) < 2)) { exact <- c(exact, v); next }
    expected <- chisq.test(tb)$expected
    if (any(expected < 5)) exact <- c(exact, v)
  }
  exact
}
```

## AE
```{r}
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# PIPELINE — AE
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ae_prefixes <- select_prefixes(ae_map, skip = character(0))
ae_wide <- build_wide(ae_all, "AE", ae_map, group) %>%
  pad_missing_subtypes(ae_map) %>%
  condition_on_any(ae_prefixes) %>%
  factorize_binary(c("any_ind", ae_prefixes))
ae_exact <- auto_exact(ae_wide, ae_prefixes, strata = "groupx")

ae_tab <- build_tableone(ae_wide, ae_prefixes,strata = "groupx")
print_tableone(ae_tab, ae_prefixes, "Adverse Events (AE)",exact = ae_exact)
```

## SAE
```{r, warning=FALSE}
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# PIPELINE — SAE
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
skip_vars = c(
  "hr_low_rel",
  "hr_high_rel",
  "hr_high_abs",
  "bp_low_rel",
  "bp_high_rel",
  "bp_high_abs"
)

sae_prefixes <- select_prefixes(sae_map, skip = skip_vars)

sae_wide <- build_wide(ae_all, "SAE", sae_map, group) %>%
  pad_missing_subtypes(sae_map) %>%
  condition_on_any(sae_prefixes) %>%
  factorize_binary(c("any_ind", sae_prefixes))

sae_exact <- auto_exact(sae_wide, sae_prefixes, strata = "groupx")

sae_tab <- build_tableone(sae_wide, sae_prefixes,strata = "groupx")
print_tableone(sae_tab, sae_prefixes, "Serious Adverse Events (SAE)", exact = sae_exact)
```

## SAE, Total events/patient
```{r}
sae2 = ae_all %>% filter(event_type == "SAE") %>%
  group_by(sid) %>%
  summarise(sae_count = n(), .groups = "drop")

sae2 = group %>% select(sid, groupx) %>%
  left_join(.,sae2, by = "sid") %>%
  mutate(sae_count = replace_na(sae_count, 0L))

sae2$sae_count = as.character(sae2$sae_count)

# tableone
sae2_tab <- CreateTableOne(
  vars       = "sae_count",
  strata     = "groupx",
  data       = sae2
)

print(sae2_tab,
      nonnormal     = "sae_count",
      smd           = TRUE,
      showAllLevels = FALSE,
      quote         = FALSE,
      exact         = "sae_count",
      noSpaces      = TRUE)
  
```
## any kind of AE (AE + SAE)
```{r}
ae2 = ae_all %>% select(sid, event_type)

ae2 = ae2 %>% group_by(sid) %>%
  summarise(any_ae = ifelse(any(event_type %in% c("AE", "SAE")), 1, 0), 
            ae_count = sum(event_type %in% c("AE", "SAE")), .groups = "drop")
# then merge with group (na as 0) and make tableone
ae2 = group %>% select(sid, groupx) %>%
  left_join(.,ae2, by = "sid") %>%
  mutate(any_ae = replace_na(any_ae, 0L),
         # ae_count = replace_na(ae_count, 0L),
         any_ae = factor(any_ae, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("No", "Yes")))

any_ae_tab <- CreateTableOne(
  vars       = c("any_ae", "ae_count"),
  factorVars = "any_ae",
  strata     = "groupx",
  data       = ae2
)

print(any_ae_tab,
      nonnormal     = "ae_count",
      smd           = TRUE,
      showAllLevels = FALSE,
      quote         = FALSE,
      noSpaces      = TRUE)
```
